memoryArtifacts.headline: Thomas Englefield  knighted on Henry 8th brother’s wedding day
memoryArtifacts.description: Thomas Englefield, aka Englefeild, Ingelfielde,[3] Inglefeld,[4] Englefeld,[5] was born in 1455,[6] probably at Englefield, Berkshire, England, which his family had held since the twelfth century.[7] …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Englefield於1455年出生在英國波克夏恩格利費爾德時，他的父親John D'englefield25歲，母親Jane De Milborne22歲。他於大約1470年與Margery Danvers結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和15個女兒的父母。他於1501年登記服兵役。他於1497年在英國波克夏被列為speaker of the house of commons。他去世於1514年4月3日在他的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在英國波克夏恩格利費爾德聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Englefield于1455年出生在英国波克夏恩格利費爾德时，他的父亲John D'englefield25岁，母亲Jane De Milborne22岁。他于大约1470年与Margery Danvers结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和15个女儿的父母。他于1501年登记服兵役。他于1497年在英国波克夏被列为speaker of the house of commons。他去世于1514年4月3日在他的家乡享年59岁，埋葬在英国波克夏恩格利費爾德聖 馬也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Englefield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from either of two places called Englefield (in Berks and Surrey).  Compare  Inglefield  .

variants.name: Inglefield
meanings: English: locative name from Englefield (Surrey), recorded as Ingelfeld in 1282, or Englefield (Berks).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Englefield was born in 1455, in Englefield, Berkshire, England, his father, John D'englefield, was 25 and his mother, Jane De Milborne, was 22. He married Margery Danvers about 1470. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 15 daughters. He registered for military service in 1501. In 1497, at the age of 42, his occupation is listed as speaker of the house of commons in Berkshire, England. He died on 3 April 1514, in his hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in St Mark's Church, Englefield, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Englefield est né en 1455, à Englefield, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, John D'englefield, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Jane De Milborne, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margery Danvers environ 1470. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 15 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1501. En 1497, à l’âge de 42 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est speaker of the house of commons à Berkshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 3 avril 1514, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à St Mark's Church, Englefield, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.St Mark's Church, Englefield, Berkshire,: St Mark's Church, Englefield, Berkshire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Englefield 1455 in Englefield, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John D'englefield 25 und seine Mutter Jane De Milborne 22. Er hat um 1470 Margery Danvers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 15 Töchter. Er hat sich 1501 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1497, als er 42 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als speaker of the house of commons in Berkshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 3. April 1514 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in St Mark's Church, Englefield, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Englefield è nato il nel 1455 nel Englefield, Berkshire, England, il suo padre, John D'englefield, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Jane De Milborne, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Margery Danvers circa 1470. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 15 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1501. Nel 1497, all'età di 42 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come speaker of the house of commons nel Berkshire, England. Morì il 3 aprile 1514, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mark's Church, Englefield, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Englefieldが1455年にイギリスバークシュアイアエングレフィールドで生まれた時，父John D'englefieldは25歳，母Jane De Milborneは22歳であった。約1470年にMargery Danversと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と15人の娘の親であった。彼は1501年に兵役登録をした。1497年，42歳の時，イギリスバークシュアイアでの職業はspeaker of the house of commonsと記録されている。彼は1514年4月3日に故郷で59歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアエングレフィールドスト マーク'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mark's Church, Englefield, Berkshire,: 영국 버크실르 잉글레필드 스트 마k'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Englefield(이)가 1455년 영국 버크실르 잉글레필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John D'englefield(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane De Milborne(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1470년 Margery Danvers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1501년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1497년, 42세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 버크실르에서 speaker of the house of commons이었다. 그는 1514년 4월 3일 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 잉글레필드 스트 마k'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.St Mark's Church, Englefield, Berkshire,: St Mark's Church, Englefield, Berkshire, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Englefield nasceu em 1455, em Englefield, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John D'englefield, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Jane De Milborne, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Danvers aproximadamente 1470. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 15 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1501. Em 1497, com 42 anos, sua profissão aparece como speaker of the house of commons em Berkshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 3 de abril de 1514, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mark's Church, Englefield, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.St Mark's Church, Englefield, Berkshire,: ст марк'с чурч, энглефиелд, биркшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Englefield родился в 1455 г. в местности энглефиелд, биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John D'englefield было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane De Milborne, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Danvers около 1470 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 15 дочерей. В 1501 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1497 году, в возрасте 42 лет, работал по профессии speaker of the house of commons в местности биркшир, Англия. Он умер 3 апреля 1514 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности ст марк'с чурч, энглефиелд, биркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Englefield nació en 1455, en Englefield, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John D'englefield, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Jane De Milborne, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Margery Danvers aproximadamente 1470. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 15 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1501. En 1497, a la edad de 42 años, su ocupación registrada era speaker of the house of commons en Berkshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 3 de abril de 1514, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en St Mark's Church, Englefield, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
